positive: A highly stylized, symmetrical celestial landscape featuring abstract mountain peaks, minimalist geometric stars, and stylized crescent moons. The style must emulate a clean, two-tone linocut or woodblock print aesthetic. Composition must be centered and balanced, designed for a seamless apparel print. Color palette consists of deep midnight indigo blues, burnt sienna oranges, and clean cream highlights. Emphasis on strong silhouettes, high contrast, and crisp, defined linework. Full body shot, ultra-detailed flat lay, vector quality, suitable for screen printing.
negative: artifact, blurry, signature, watermark, text, logo, low detail, noise, grainy, extra limbs, bad anatomy, jpeg artifacts, gradient, photo, realistic, messy
